ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_types" (
  "tax_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tax type (e.g., VAT, Income Tax) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tax type (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the tax type (e.g., sales tax, property tax) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax regulation */,
  "tax_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax type associated with the regulation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the regulation applies */,
  "applicability" TEXT /* Applicability of the regulation (e.g., business, individual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the regulation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the regulation was last updated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_regulations_tax_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_type_id") REFERENCES tax_types ("tax_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_regulations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_obligations" (
  "obligation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance obligation */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax regulation associated with the obligation */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the compliance obligation */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the obligation (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance requirement */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Penalty amount for non-compliance */,
  "fine" TEXT /* Fine amount for non-compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obligation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_obligations_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES tax_regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_requirements" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document requirement */,
  "obligation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance obligation associated with the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document required (e.g., invoice, tax return) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document requirement */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the document required (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_requirements_obligation_id FOREIGN KEY ("obligation_id") REFERENCES compliance_obligations ("obligation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance, legal, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., regulation, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation version */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax regulation associated with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the version became effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulation_versions_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES tax_regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax audit */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax regulation associated with the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the audit */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_audits_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES tax_regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax incentive */,
  "tax_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax type associated with the incentive */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the incentive applies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax incentive */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required to qualify for the incentive */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_incentives_tax_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_type_id") REFERENCES tax_types ("tax_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_incentives_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit result */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit associated with the result */,
  "finding" TEXT /* Finding from the audit (e.g., discrepancies, compliance issues) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for rectifying issues found during the audit */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Action plan to implement the recommendations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_results_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES tax_audits ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message regarding compliance deadlines or updates */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date for reminders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance status */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax regulation associated with the status */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was verified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_status_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES tax_regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration request (e.g., meeting, discussion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration request associated with the response */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responding */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was made */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the collaboration request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES collaboration_requests ("request_id")
)
